steps.title: Recall the mean formula
steps.content:
$$\text{mean} = \dfrac{\text{sum of values}}{\text{number of values}}$$

Sum the 5 task times from the table, then divide by 5.

steps.title: Compute
steps.content:
Adding the 5 times in the table gives a total of $50$ minutes.

$$\text{mean} = \dfrac{50}{5} = 10 \text{ minutes}$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
